mapper.sql: reservation_id, user_id, store_id, table_id, cat_profile_id, reservation_time, duration_min, party_size, special_request, order_amount, total_amount, status, points_used, points_earned, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from public.reservations
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into public.reservations (reservation_id, user_id, store_id, table_id, cat_profile_id, reservation_time, duration_min, party_size, special_request, order_amount, total_amount, status, points_used, points_earned, created_at, updated_at) values (#{reservationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tableId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{catProfileId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reservationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{durationMin,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{partySize,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{specialRequest,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{totalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pointsUsed,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pointsEarned,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into public.reservations
reservation_id,
user_id,
store_id,
table_id,
cat_profile_id,
reservation_time,
duration_min,
party_size,
special_request,
order_amount,
total_amount,
status,
points_used,
points_earned,
created_at,
updated_at,
#{reservationId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{tableId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{catProfileId,jdbcType=INTEGER},

#{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update public.reservations
reservation_id = #{row.reservationId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_id = #{row.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
store_id = #{row.storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
table_id = #{row.tableId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cat_profile_id = #{row.catProfileId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reservation_time = #{row.reservationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
duration_min = #{row.durationMin,jdbcType=INTEGER},
party_size = #{row.partySize,jdbcType=INTEGER},
special_request = #{row.specialRequest,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_amount = #{row.orderAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
total_amount = #{row.totalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
points_used = #{row.pointsUsed,jdbcType=INTEGER},
points_earned = #{row.pointsEarned,jdbcType=INTEGER},
created_at = #{row.createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{row.updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update public.reservations set reservation_id = #{row.reservationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_id = #{row.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, store_id = #{row.storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, table_id = #{row.tableId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cat_profile_id = #{row.catProfileId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reservation_time = #{row.reservationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, duration_min = #{row.durationMin,jdbcType=INTEGER}, party_size = #{row.partySize,jdbcType=INTEGER}, special_request = #{row.specialRequest,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_amount = #{row.orderAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, total_amount = #{row.totalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, points_used = #{row.pointsUsed,jdbcType=INTEGER}, points_earned = #{row.pointsEarned,jdbcType=INTEGER}, created_at = #{row.createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{row.updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update public.reservations
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
table_id = #{tableId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cat_profile_id = #{catProfileId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reservation_time = #{reservationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
duration_min = #{durationMin,jdbcType=INTEGER},
party_size = #{partySize,jdbcType=INTEGER},
special_request = #{specialRequest,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_amount = #{orderAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
total_amount = #{totalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
points_used = #{pointsUsed,jdbcType=INTEGER},
points_earned = #{pointsEarned,jdbcType=INTEGER},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where reservation_id = #{reservationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update public.reservations set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, table_id = #{tableId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cat_profile_id = #{catProfileId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reservation_time = #{reservationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, duration_min = #{durationMin,jdbcType=INTEGER}, party_size = #{partySize,jdbcType=INTEGER}, special_request = #{specialRequest,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_amount = #{orderAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, total_amount = #{totalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, points_used = #{pointsUsed,jdbcType=INTEGER}, points_earned = #{pointsEarned,jdbcType=INTEGER}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where reservation_id = #{reservationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
